Properties.Text: A conversation about cigarette filters

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Do you have filters?

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: You're an angel.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: 'Come on. You have papers. I saw you smoking outside.'

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: She smiles, crudely. She doesn't trust you. Thinks you're a shitty guy. Fucking with her, or something, because you want to get closer, because that's what they do, guys, they want you to hate them. 'Are you trying to fuck with me?'
A conversation about the music

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Isn't this amazing?

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: She blushes. 'Do you? I love trance. I love it. Angel voice. God whispers in the power. The sting is a signal from heaven.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: 'Oh.' Disappointed, maybe? Did you upset her? Listen, you're in the club. Loosen up. Try to make friends. Don't be so lonely.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: 'I feel it. I feel everything. The music is here with me.'

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: She looks dead at you, wondering who you are, and all the stories you will take with you when you disappear, when you never see her again. 'I hid the rest of it behind the speakers. If you want some.' She pulls you in and kisses you. Her lips are bitter.
A Czech conversation

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: 'Odkud jste?' She smiles at you, her eyes moons blinking in the strobes.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: She can't stop laughing. 'Chceš jít s námi dnes večer?'

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Yes.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Are there? Have you tried them?

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Her whole face lights up. She grabs your arm and pulls you closer. 'Ty mluvis cesky!' She's beaming. You have no idea what she's saying but it doesn't matter.
Looking for a friend

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: She is looking around, at the lights, at anyone passing her by. Something about her makes you want to talk to her. 'Have you seen my friend?'

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: People go in. Different people come out. Same clothes though.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Bogna.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Nothing here does. Just keep dancing.
Another search for a friend

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Have you seen my friend? Tall, wearing all black... like everyone else here.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: She had this look. Like she knew something the rest of us didn't.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Did you though? I feel like I've seen you before.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Nobody leaves. You know that, right?
The lights know things

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: The lights... they know things.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Better than okay. I can see the rhythm. It's a color. It's a shape.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Where you've been. Where you're going. What you're carrying. They adjust.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: You mean the DJ adjusts the lights.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: There is no DJ.
Warning about stopping

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Keep moving. If you stop, you become one of them.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: The shadows. The ones you can almost see. They were people once.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Because I stopped once. Just for a second. I felt myself... fading. Like a signal losing frequency.
The weird woman at the cloakroom

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Nobody's come for their coat in hours. I'm starting to think they're all still dancing.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: The best ones always are. You'll forget your coat too, I bet.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Someone has to watch the coats. But I tap my feet when no one's looking.
The door guy

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Keep it moving. VIP's through the back. Don't start trouble.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: The kind that ends with you outside. Just enjoy the music.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Every night's the same. Loud music, lost people, somebody crying in the bathroom.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [SHADOW:12] Blend into the crowd behind him

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: He doesn't even notice you slip past. You're already gone.
The Czech girl's friend

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: She does this every time. Starts speaking Czech to strangers and sees what happens.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: You're still here, aren't you?

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Neither does she, half the time. She just likes the sound of it.
Someone in the stall

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Go away. Occupied.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: I'm fine. Just... give me a minute.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [WORD:8] Come on, talk to me. What's going on?

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: ...My friends left without me. I don't know where they went. I've been sitting here for like an hour.
Someone needs help

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Can you pass me some toilet paper? There's none in here.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: Great. Just great. This is the worst night of my life.
The player character
A generic club NPC
[PLACEHOLDER DIALOGUE] The bartender

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: What.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: You're supposed to tell me what you want.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010001
Properties.Text: The bartender says nothing. Her eyes are already on someone else.
[PLACEHOLDER DIALOGUE] Jordi — foreign stylist, trades clothes for cash
A tanned man in a silk shirt looks you over. "Hey. You look like you have some things worth trading."
Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000000E00

Properties.Text: What are you buying?
[Leave] No thanks.
He grins. "I buy clothes. Interesting ones. If you have something with style, I'll make you an offer." [SELL MENU OPENS]
Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000000E00

Properties.Text: He shrugs. "Your loss, friend. Come back when you're ready to trade."
Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000000E00
0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [PLACEHOLDER] I think I saw someone like that.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [WORD:10] [PLACEHOLDER] Describe the last place you saw her.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [PLACEHOLDER] How many drinks have you had?

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [SHADOW:12] [PLACEHOLDER] Look where the lights are pointing.

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [PLACEHOLDER] What's the weirdest thing someone left?

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [PLACEHOLDER] How long have you two been here?

Properties.Speaker: 0x0100000000010000
Properties.MenuText: [PLACEHOLDER] What kind of things do you deal in?
